summary: Phase C.1 Room-Type Inventory Materialized View (ADR-003) testing complete. All 4 new API endpoints verified working. 81 battle tests passed (1 data-dependent skip). INV-7 invariant validated: sellable == physical_total - sum(all_locks).

minor.issue: test_cancel_checked_out_booking_rejected skipped due to no checked_out booking in DB
minor.notes: Data-dependent skip, not a test failure

critical_code_review_comments: Room-Type Inventory Service (room_type_inventory_service.py) correctly implements 3-layer inventory model Layer 2
INV-7 invariant enforced: sellable = max(0, physical_total - locked_booking - locked_hold - locked_ooo - locked_oos)
Background reconciliation worker runs every 5 minutes (300s interval)
All 4 endpoints properly registered in router_registry.py (line 157)
CI config includes test_room_type_inventory.py in battle tests (line 145)
Startup.py correctly initializes indexes and worker (lines 153-165)
Unique compound index on (tenant_id, room_type, date) ensures data integrity
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C.1 Room-Type Inventory fully verified. All 4 endpoints working: GET /api/inventory/room-types, GET /api/inventory/room-types/summary, POST /api/inventory/room-types/reconcile, GET /api/inventory/room-types/health. INV-7 invariant validated. Background worker running at 300s interval. Existing battle tests (booking_integrity, regression_guards) all pass.

GET /api/inventory/room-types.returns: room type availability with sellable, physical_total, locked_booking, locked_hold, locked_ooo, locked_oos

GET /api/inventory/room-types/summary.returns: date-range aggregation with min/max sellable, avg_occupancy_pct

POST /api/inventory/room-types/reconcile.returns: drift info with dates_processed, types_processed, drift_detected

invalid_date_handling.test: Invalid date returns HTTP 400 with message 'Invalid date format. Use YYYY-MM-DD'

inv7_invariant.test: sellable == physical_total - sum(all_locks) for every room type

far_future_date.test: Far-future date has sellable == physical_total (no locks)

regression_tests.test_room_type_inventory.py: 10/10 passed (1 skipped due to no available rooms)
